title: キラッと輝くマーベラス☆

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure we'll be able to see shooting stars?
The sky's so cloudy!
choice_data_list: We just have to wait a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come out to help with a meteor shower
viewing event for children.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's only an hour to sunset, but the weather report
doesn't look promising.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Still, you never know! Things might clear up
suddenly! We just have to trust the skies and be
patient!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I hope it'll clear as well, but if we're going to
cancel the event, it'd be wise to do so sooner
than later. As our supervisor, what do you think
we should do?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Well, in that case, let's make our own shooting
stars!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat the details! ☆ For now, we need to
go to Tracen! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your patience, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this marvelous meteor shower that's exclusive to Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Here we go! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Twinkle! Glitter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Marvelous Sunday sprints about with light
sticks, their afterimage creates a smattering of
sparkling lights under the cloudy skies... They're a
far cry from real shooting stars though.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Hahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, she continues to run around, and the
glow from the light sticks seems to last longer and
longer as she speeds up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: This marvelous show's just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
What? When did the clouds scatter? How can this
be?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Dazzling and beautiful! It's maaarvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clouds dissipate and the beautiful night sky
unrolls above us. It's almost as if there were never
any clouds in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sparkle! ☆

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look! It's a shooting star! Did you see that
flash?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But the bizarre trajectory is nothing like a
shooting star's!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ooh, it's flying around! That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Are we experiencing a mass hallucination? That
light can't be natural!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Okay, time for the grand finale!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
These stars have been simply marvelous! ☆ Thank
you for the dazzling memories!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Glitter! Gleam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the moment passes, the shooting stars and
mysterious lights vanish, and the night sky looks
perfectly unremarkable once again.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! ☆ That was so beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It was indeed, though I'm more curious about
what that flying light was exactly.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: What do you make of that phenomenon we saw?
choice_data_list:
Maybe we were seeing things because we're
tired?

I want to see it again so I can figure out what it
was!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's logical, but it doesn't explain everything.
I'd like to conduct a proper study...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the strange experience,
Marvelous Sunday and Ikuno Dictus come to chat
with me.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Look at this! The kids from the other day drew
some pictures of the meteor shower!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their illustrations are of countless shooting stars
streaking across the sky... and one particularly
bright light.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It appears we all witnessed the same
phenomenon. What happened that night can't be
explained away as a mere dream.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! It was a marvelous night! ☆
Marvelous beyond explanation, in fact! ★

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... For some reason, it's quite convincing
when you put it that way.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Let's see if Marvelous can recreate the
phenomenon.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ooh, then let's try it together this time!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Maaarvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though we all wave our light sticks around
wildly, there's no sign of the mysterious light.
Perhaps whatever made it has gone already.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It could be that certain criteria must be met in
order to trigger that light, such as time of day
and coordination of our sticks.

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: But we're all as pretty as real stars now!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
We are! ☆ And I'm sure the marvelousness you're
all spreading will reach that light! ★ I'm
positive! ☆
